holdings.infoBox: EXI is an equity ETF with a total of 238 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 4.29%, GE Aerospace at 3.56%, GE Vernova at 2.57%, RTX Corporation at 2.50%, and Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 2.28%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Industrials ETF (EXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global industrial stocks. EXI was launched on Sep 12, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P Global 1200 Industrials Sector Capped Index

data.title: Stocks rally on trade deal
data.text: CNBC's Seema Mody reports on the stocks that are getting a lift from the U.S.-Mexico-Canada trade deal.
